originaltripleset.otriple: Carolina Hurricanes | defeated | Columbus Blue Jackets

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Carolina Hurricanes | defeated | Columbus Blue Jackets

entry.lex: In an NHL 23/24 regular season matchup, the Carolina Hurricanes defeated the Columbus Blue Jackets 3-2. Both teams remained scoreless through the first two periods, with all scoring occurring in the third period.

originaltripleset.otriple: Spartak Moscow goals | occurred_in | second period
Spartak Moscow goals | occurred_in | third period
Avtomobilist Yekaterinburg goal | occurred_in | third period

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Spartak Moscow goals | occurred_in | second period
Spartak Moscow goals | occurred_in | third period
Avtomobilist Yekaterinburg goal | occurred_in | third period

entry.lex: In a KHL 23/24 round 1 match, Spartak Moscow defeated Avtomobilist Yekaterinburg 4-1. After a scoreless first period, Spartak took control with two goals in both the second and third periods, while Avtomobilist managed only a single goal in the final period.
In a Russian MHL 23/24 round 1 ice hockey match, Stalnye Lisy defeated Irbis Kazan 4-3. After a 3-3 tie in regulation time, Stalnye Lisy secured the victory via a penalty shootout.
Mora IK dominated Almtuna IS with a 6-0 victory in round 19 of the Hockey Allsvenskan 23/24 season, scoring two goals in the second period and four in the third.

originaltripleset.otriple: Stalnye Lisy defeated Irbis Kazan | part_of | MHL 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Stalnye Lisy defeated Irbis Kazan | part_of | MHL 23/24 season

entry.lex: In the MHL 23/24 season, Stalnye Lisy defeated Irbis Kazan 5-3. Stalnye Lisy led early with 2 goals in the first period and maintained their advantage to secure the victory.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | Swedish HockeyEttan Vastra 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | Swedish HockeyEttan Vastra 23/24 season

entry.lex: In round 14 of the Swedish HockeyEttan Vastra 23/24 season, Falu IF defeated Mariestads BOIS 5-4 after overtime, following a 4-4 deadlock in regulation time.

originaltripleset.otriple: HC TWK Innsbruck | defeated | EC VSV
matchup | part_of | round 24 of the 23/24 ICE Hockey League in Austria

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: HC TWK Innsbruck | defeated | EC VSV
matchup | part_of | round 24 of the 23/24 ICE Hockey League in Austria

entry.lex: In round 24 of the 23/24 ICE Hockey League in Austria, HC TWK Innsbruck defeated EC VSV 3-2. After trailing 0-1 in the first period, Innsbruck rallied with two goals in the second and one in the third to secure the win.

In round 22 of the Polish Ekstraliga 23/24 season, GKS Tychy defeated Unia Oświęcim 5-4. After a scoreless first period and a 2-2 tie in the second, GKS Tychy secured the win with three goals in the final period.

originaltripleset.otriple: TAURON Podhale Nowy Targ | defeated | JKH GKS Jastrzębie

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: TAURON Podhale Nowy Targ | defeated | JKH GKS Jastrzębie

entry.lex: In round 22 of the Polish Ekstraliga (23/24 season), TAURON Podhale Nowy Targ secured a dominant 10-3 victory over JKH GKS Jastrzębie, fueled by a massive 7-0 surge in the second period.

originaltripleset.otriple: Vityaz Podolsk defeated Barys Astana | part_of | KHL 23/24 round 1 match

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Vityaz Podolsk defeated Barys Astana | part_of | KHL 23/24 round 1 match

entry.lex: In a KHL 23/24 round 1 match, Vityaz Podolsk defeated Barys Astana 5-2, maintaining a consistent lead across all three periods.
In an AHL 23/24 regular season game, the Bridgeport Islanders defeated the Belleville Senators 4-2, largely driven by a strong second-period performance where they outscored the Senators 3-1.

originaltripleset.otriple: Traktor Chelyabinsk | defeated | Torpedo Nizhny Novgorod
Traktor Chelyabinsk vs Torpedo Nizhny Novgorod match | part_of | KHL 23/24 regular season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Traktor Chelyabinsk | defeated | Torpedo Nizhny Novgorod
Traktor Chelyabinsk vs Torpedo Nizhny Novgorod match | part_of | KHL 23/24 regular season

entry.lex: Traktor Chelyabinsk defeated Torpedo Nizhny Novgorod 2-1 in a KHL 23/24 regular season match.

originaltripleset.otriple: Graz 99ers defeated Vienna Capitals | part_of | ICE Hockey League 23/24

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Graz 99ers defeated Vienna Capitals | part_of | ICE Hockey League 23/24

entry.lex: In round 24 of the ICE Hockey League 23/24, the Graz 99ers defeated the Vienna Capitals 4-3 after overtime, following a 3-3 draw in regulation time.

In round 1 of the SDHL 23/24 season, Modo Hockey defeated Leksands IF 3-1. After a scoreless first period and a 1-0 lead for Leksands in the second, Modo Hockey secured the victory with three goals in the final period.

originaltripleset.otriple: Tauron KH GKS Katowice | defeated | Comarch Cracovia

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Tauron KH GKS Katowice | defeated | Comarch Cracovia

entry.lex: In round 22 of the Polish Ekstraliga 23/24 season, Tauron KH GKS Katowice dominated Comarch Cracovia with a 7-2 victory, establishing a commanding lead with 5 goals in the first period.

originaltripleset.otriple: HC Olomouc | defeated | HC Kometa Brno
matchup | part_of | Czech Republic's Extraliga 23/24 ice hockey season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: HC Olomouc | defeated | HC Kometa Brno
matchup | part_of | Czech Republic's Extraliga 23/24 ice hockey season

entry.lex: In round 22 of the Czech Republic's Extraliga 23/24 ice hockey season, HC Olomouc defeated HC Kometa Brno 3-1. After a tied first period, Olomouc secured the win by scoring one goal in each of the subsequent periods.

originaltripleset.otriple: Boston College Eagles | defeated | Harvard University
game | part_of | NCAA Men's ice hockey regular season (23/24)

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Boston College Eagles | defeated | Harvard University
game | part_of | NCAA Men's ice hockey regular season (23/24)

entry.lex: In an NCAA Men's ice hockey regular season game (23/24), the Boston College Eagles defeated Harvard University 4-1, securing the win with a dominant three-goal performance in the third period.

originaltripleset.otriple: HC Frýdek-Místek | defeated | HC Stadion Litoměřice
matchup | part_of | Czech Republic's 1st Liga (23/24 season)

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: HC Frýdek-Místek | defeated | HC Stadion Litoměřice
matchup | part_of | Czech Republic's 1st Liga (23/24 season)

entry.lex: In round 25 of the Czech Republic's 1st Liga (23/24 season), HC Frýdek-Místek secured a dominant 4-0 victory over HC Stadion Litoměřice, scoring consistently across all three periods.
The Abbotsford Canucks decisively defeated the Calgary Wranglers 7-2 in an AHL 23/24 regular season game, dominating the first two periods with 3 goals each.

In the opening round of the 23/24 Elite League, the Belfast Giants defeated the Nottingham Panthers 4-2. The game was tied 1-1 after the first period and remained scoreless in the second, but Belfast secured the victory with three goals in the final period.

originaltripleset.otriple: Sheffield Steelers | four-goal performance | third period

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Sheffield Steelers | four-goal performance | third period

entry.lex: In the Elite League 23/24 opening round, the Sheffield Steelers defeated the Guildford Flames 6-2, securing the win with a dominant four-goal performance in the third period.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | German DEL 23/24 ice hockey season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | German DEL 23/24 ice hockey season

entry.lex: In round 22 of the German DEL 23/24 ice hockey season, the Iserlohn Roosters defeated Eisbären Berlin 3-0, scoring twice in the first period and once in the third.

In an OHL 23/24 regular season match, the Peterborough Petes defeated the Sudbury Wolves 5-3. Peterborough maintained a lead throughout the game, scoring consistently across all three periods (2-1-2) compared to Sudbury's 1-0-2.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | round 20 of the SHL 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | round 20 of the SHL 23/24 season

entry.lex: In round 20 of the SHL 23/24 season, Rögle BK defeated Malmö Redhawks 4-0, scoring two goals in the first period and one in each of the following two periods.

originaltripleset.otriple: Providence Friars | defeated | Arizona State Sun Devils
game | part_of | NCAA Men's ice hockey regular season (23/24)

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Providence Friars | defeated | Arizona State Sun Devils
game | part_of | NCAA Men's ice hockey regular season (23/24)

entry.lex: In an NCAA Men's ice hockey regular season game (23/24), the Providence Friars defeated the Arizona State Sun Devils 2-1. All scoring occurred in the second period.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | German Oberliga Nord 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | German Oberliga Nord 23/24 season

entry.lex: In round 18 of the German Oberliga Nord 23/24 season, EHC Erfurt defeated Fuchse Duisburg 4-3. After trailing 1-0 in the first period and tying it 3-3 by the end of the second, Erfurt secured the win with two goals in the final period.
In a QMJHL 23/24 regular season game, the Halifax Mooseheads defeated the Moncton Wildcats 4-0, scoring consistently across all three periods.

originaltripleset.otriple: HC Motor České Budějovice | defeated | HC Verva Litvínov
game | part_of | Czech Republic Ice Hockey Extraliga 23/24

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: HC Motor České Budějovice | defeated | HC Verva Litvínov
game | part_of | Czech Republic Ice Hockey Extraliga 23/24

entry.lex: In round 22 of the Czech Republic Ice Hockey Extraliga 23/24, HC Motor České Budějovice defeated HC Verva Litvínov 1-0. The game remained scoreless through the first two periods, with the decisive goal scored in the third period.

originaltripleset.otriple: Miami Ohio Redhawks | defeated | Mercyhurst Lakers
game | part_of | NCAA Men's ice hockey regular season (23/24)

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Miami Ohio Redhawks | defeated | Mercyhurst Lakers
game | part_of | NCAA Men's ice hockey regular season (23/24)

entry.lex: In an NCAA Men's ice hockey regular season game (23/24), the Miami Ohio Redhawks defeated the Mercyhurst Lakers 2-0, scoring one goal each in the first and third periods.
In a QMJHL 23/24 regular season game, the Drummondville Voltigeurs defeated the Shawinigan Cataractes 3-1. All scoring occurred in the third period after a scoreless first and second.

originaltripleset.otriple: HC Chelny scoring | occurred_in | second period
HK Ryazan scoring | occurred_in | final period

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: HC Chelny scoring | occurred_in | second period
HK Ryazan scoring | occurred_in | final period

entry.lex: In a Russian VHL 23/24 ice hockey match, HK Ryazan defeated HC Chelny 3-1. The game remained scoreless in the first period, with Chelny scoring in the second, before Ryazan secured the victory with three goals in the final period.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | Belarus Extraliga 23/24 season opener

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | Belarus Extraliga 23/24 season opener

entry.lex: In the Belarus Extraliga 23/24 season opener, Neman Grodno defeated Shakhter Soligorsk 3-2. After a 2-2 tie in the first period, Neman Grodno secured the win with a single goal in the second period, followed by a scoreless third.
In the Belarus Extraliga 23/24 season, HK Vitebsk secured a dominant 6-1 victory over Khimik-SKA Novopolotsk, with the majority of their scoring occurring in the second period.

originaltripleset.otriple: HC ZUBR Přerov | defeated | PSG Berani Zlín
match | part_of | Czech Republic's 1st Liga (23/24 season)

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: HC ZUBR Přerov | defeated | PSG Berani Zlín
match | part_of | Czech Republic's 1st Liga (23/24 season)

entry.lex: In round 25 of the Czech Republic's 1st Liga (23/24 season), HC ZUBR Přerov defeated PSG Berani Zlín 3-2. The match was tied 2-2 after regulation time, with both teams scoring one goal each in the first two periods and neither scoring in the third; HC ZUBR Přerov ultimately secured the win via a penalty shootout.

In round 19 of the Hockey Allsvenskan 23/24 season, BIK Karlskoga defeated Östersunds IK 2-1. After Östersund took an early lead in the first period, Karlskoga rallied with a goal in both the second and third periods to secure the victory.

The Sudbury Wolves defeated the Oshawa Generals 7-5 in an OHL 23/24 regular season game. Despite trailing 1-0 after the first period, Sudbury surged with 7 goals across the final two periods to secure the victory.
In a VHL 23/24 round 1 ice hockey match, Molot Perm defeated SKA-Neva 2-0, scoring one goal in each of the second and third periods.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | Sweden's HockeyEttan Norra 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | Sweden's HockeyEttan Norra 23/24 season

entry.lex: In the opening round of Sweden's HockeyEttan Norra 23/24 season, Bodens HF defeated Hudiksvalls HC 4-1, securing the win with a strong three-goal performance in the first period.

originaltripleset.otriple: Rittner Buam defeated EHC Lustenau | part_of | opening round of the 23/24 Alps Hockey League

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Rittner Buam defeated EHC Lustenau | part_of | opening round of the 23/24 Alps Hockey League

entry.lex: In the opening round of the 23/24 Alps Hockey League, Rittner Buam defeated EHC Lustenau 7-3, maintaining a consistent scoring lead across all three periods.

originaltripleset.otriple: HC Dukla Jihlava | defeated | HC Banik Sokolov
HC Dukla Jihlava vs HC Banik Sokolov | part_of | Chance Liga (23/24 season)

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: HC Dukla Jihlava | defeated | HC Banik Sokolov
HC Dukla Jihlava vs HC Banik Sokolov | part_of | Chance Liga (23/24 season)

entry.lex: In round 25 of the Czech Republic's Chance Liga (23/24 season), HC Dukla Jihlava defeated HC Banik Sokolov with a final score of 4-1.
In round 21 of the Germany DEL 2 23/24 season, EV Landshut defeated the Bietigheim Steelers 4-2.

In the WHL 23/24 Women Championship, Biryusa Krasnoyarsk defeated Tornado Dmitrov 3-1. Biryusa took an early lead with two goals in the first period and added a final goal in the third to secure the victory.

originaltripleset.otriple: Detroit Red Wings | defeated | Minnesota Wild

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Detroit Red Wings | defeated | Minnesota Wild

entry.lex: In an NHL 23/24 regular season game, the Detroit Red Wings defeated the Minnesota Wild 4-1, pulling away with three goals scored across the second and third periods after a 1-1 tie in the first.

originaltripleset.otriple: Russian MHL ice hockey match | part_of | 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Russian MHL ice hockey match | part_of | 23/24 season

entry.lex: Loko Yaroslavl defeated Mikhailov Academy 4-0 in a Russian MHL ice hockey match during the 23/24 season, with all scoring occurring in the first two periods.

originaltripleset.otriple: Lokomotiv Yaroslavl's lead | occurred_in | first period
Lokomotiv Yaroslavl's goal | occurred_in | third period

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Lokomotiv Yaroslavl's lead | occurred_in | first period
Lokomotiv Yaroslavl's goal | occurred_in | third period

entry.lex: In a KHL 23/24 round 1 matchup, Lokomotiv Yaroslavl defeated CSKA Moscow 3-2. Lokomotiv took an early lead in the first period and sealed the win with a goal in the third, while CSKA's scoring was concentrated entirely in the second period.

originaltripleset.otriple: LHK Jestřábi Prostějov | defeated | HC RT Torax Poruba

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: LHK Jestřábi Prostějov | defeated | HC RT Torax Poruba

entry.lex: In round 25 of the Czech Republic's Chance Liga (23/24 season), LHK Jestřábi Prostějov defeated HC RT Torax Poruba 5-4. After trailing 1-0 in the first period, Prostějov dominated the second period 3-0 and held on through a high-scoring third period to secure the win.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | German ice hockey Oberliga Sud 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | German ice hockey Oberliga Sud 23/24 season

entry.lex: In round 21 of the German ice hockey Oberliga Sud 23/24 season, Heilbronner Falken defeated Lindau Islanders 4-1. Heilbronn secured the win with goals in the first and third periods, while Lindau only managed to score once in the opening period.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | Slovakian Ice Hockey Extraliga 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | Slovakian Ice Hockey Extraliga 23/24 season

entry.lex: In round 21 of the Slovakian Ice Hockey Extraliga 23/24 season, HK Poprad decisively defeated HKM Zvolen with a final score of 5-1, driven by a strong second-period performance where they scored three goals.

originaltripleset.otriple: HC AKM Tula | defeated | Omskie Kryliya
HC AKM Tula victory over Omskie Kryliya | part_of | Russian VHL 23/24 round 1

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: HC AKM Tula | defeated | Omskie Kryliya
HC AKM Tula victory over Omskie Kryliya | part_of | Russian VHL 23/24 round 1

entry.lex: In a Russian VHL 23/24 round 1 ice hockey match, HC AKM Tula secured a dominant 5-0 victory over Omskie Kryliya, scoring consistently across all three periods.
In the first round of the HockeyEttan Ostra 23/24 season, Hanvikens SK defeated Segeltorps IF 6-2, pulling away with a strong three-goal third period.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | Swedish Hockey Allsvenskan 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | Swedish Hockey Allsvenskan 23/24 season

entry.lex: In Round 19 of the Swedish Hockey Allsvenskan 23/24 season, AIK defeated Tingsryds AIF 3-2 after overtime (AET), following a 2-2 draw in regulation time.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | round 24 of the 23/24 ICE Hockey League

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | round 24 of the 23/24 ICE Hockey League

entry.lex: In round 24 of the 23/24 ICE Hockey League, HK Olimpija defeated KAC Klagenfurt 3-2, securing the win via a penalty shootout after the game ended 2-2 in normal time.

originaltripleset.otriple: Brûleurs de Loups Grenoble | defeated | Anglet Hormadi Pays Basque
matchup | part_of | 23/24 Ligue Magnus ice hockey season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Brûleurs de Loups Grenoble | defeated | Anglet Hormadi Pays Basque
matchup | part_of | 23/24 Ligue Magnus ice hockey season

entry.lex: In round 20 of the 23/24 Ligue Magnus ice hockey season, Brûleurs de Loups Grenoble secured a dominant 5-0 victory over Anglet Hormadi Pays Basque, scoring consistently across all three periods.
In the Belarus Extraliga 23/24 season, HK Gomel defeated HK Lida 4-2. Gomel secured the win primarily in the first two periods, while Lida managed a goal in the first and third.

originaltripleset.otriple: LeKi Hockey | four-goal performance | third period

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: LeKi Hockey | four-goal performance | third period

entry.lex: In the Suomi Sarja 23/24 season, LeKi Hockey defeated Riemu 5-1. LeKi dominated the third period with four goals to secure the victory.

originaltripleset.otriple: Neftyanik Almetyevsk defeated Gornyak UMMC | part_of | Russian VHL 23/24 ice hockey match

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Neftyanik Almetyevsk defeated Gornyak UMMC | part_of | Russian VHL 23/24 ice hockey match

entry.lex: In a Russian VHL 23/24 ice hockey match, Neftyanik Almetyevsk defeated Gornyak UMMC 4-1, dominating the first two periods before each team scored once in the third.

originaltripleset.otriple: Boxers de Bordeaux | defeated | Jokers de Cergy-Pontoise
matchup | part_of | round 20 Ligue Magnus 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Boxers de Bordeaux | defeated | Jokers de Cergy-Pontoise
matchup | part_of | round 20 Ligue Magnus 23/24 season

entry.lex: In a round 20 Ligue Magnus match for the 23/24 season, Boxers de Bordeaux defeated Jokers de Cergy-Pontoise 4-3 after overtime. The game was tied 3-3 at the end of regulation, with Bordeaux dominating the first half and Cergy-Pontoise fighting back in the third period.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | Erste Liga 23/24 ice hockey season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | Erste Liga 23/24 ice hockey season

entry.lex: In the first round of the Erste Liga 23/24 ice hockey season, Corona Brașov defeated UTE with a final score of 6-2.

originaltripleset.otriple: match | part_of | Germany Oberliga Nord 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: match | part_of | Germany Oberliga Nord 23/24 season

entry.lex: In the Germany Oberliga Nord 23/24 season (Round 18), Herner EV defeated the Rostock Piranhas 5-4. The match ended in a 4-4 draw after regulation time, with Herner EV securing the win via a penalty shootout.
In the opening round of the SDHL 23/24 season, SDE Hockey secured a dominant 6-1 victory over AIK IF, scoring consistently with two goals in each of the three periods.

originaltripleset.otriple: three goals | occurred_in | first two periods

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: three goals | occurred_in | first two periods

entry.lex: In an NHL 23/24 regular season matchup, the Nashville Predators defeated the Winnipeg Jets 3-2. Nashville secured their lead with three goals scored across the first two periods, while Winnipeg attempted a late comeback with two goals in the third period.
In the Russia WHL 23/24 season, Biryusa Krasnoyarsk dominated Tornado Dmitrov with an 8-2 victory, driven by a strong five-goal performance in the second period.

originaltripleset.otriple: Columbus Blue Jackets | defeated | Boston Bruins

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Columbus Blue Jackets | defeated | Boston Bruins

entry.lex: In an NHL 23/24 regular season game, the Columbus Blue Jackets defeated the Boston Bruins 5-2. Columbus took a commanding lead early, scoring five goals across three periods, while Boston was held scoreless until the third period.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | Erste Liga 23/24 ice hockey season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | Erste Liga 23/24 ice hockey season

entry.lex: In the first round of the Erste Liga 23/24 ice hockey season, FEHA19 defeated Dunaújvárosi Acélbikák 1-0, with the decisive goal scored in the second period.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | round 20 of the 23/24 Ligue Magnus

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | round 20 of the 23/24 Ligue Magnus

entry.lex: In round 20 of the 23/24 Ligue Magnus, Amiens Hockey Élite secured a dominant 6-1 victory over Chamonix, with Amiens scoring three goals in both the first and third periods.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | round 19 of the Hockey Allsvenskan 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | round 19 of the Hockey Allsvenskan 23/24 season

entry.lex: Brynäs IF defeated Nybro IF 4-1 in round 19 of the Hockey Allsvenskan 23/24 season, pulling away with three goals in the final two periods after a 1-1 tie in the first.
In the MHL 23/24 season, Amurskie Tigry defeated Sahalinskie Akuly 4-2. After a scoreless first period, Amurskie Tigry took control in the second and third periods to secure the victory.

In round 21 of the German DEL 2 23/24 season, VER Selb defeated Dresdner Eislöwen 5-3. Selb took an early lead in the first period, while Dresden rallied in the second, but Selb ultimately secured the victory.

originaltripleset.otriple: Brandon Wheat Kings | defeated | Prince Albert Raiders

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Brandon Wheat Kings | defeated | Prince Albert Raiders

entry.lex: In a WHL 23/24 regular season matchup, the Brandon Wheat Kings defeated the Prince Albert Raiders 3-1. After a scoreless first period, the Wheat Kings took control in the second with two goals, ultimately securing the win.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | 23/24 Naisten Liiga women's ice hockey season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | 23/24 Naisten Liiga women's ice hockey season

entry.lex: HIFK Helsinki dominated RoKi Hockey with a 6-0 shutout victory in the opening round of the 23/24 Naisten Liiga women's ice hockey season.

originaltripleset.otriple: EC Hannover Indians | defeated | Herforder Ice Dragons
matchup | part_of | German Ice Hockey Oberliga Nord 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: EC Hannover Indians | defeated | Herforder Ice Dragons
matchup | part_of | German Ice Hockey Oberliga Nord 23/24 season

entry.lex: In round 18 of the German Ice Hockey Oberliga Nord 23/24 season, EC Hannover Indians secured a dominant 11-4 victory over the Herforder Ice Dragons.

originaltripleset.otriple: ESC Halle Saale Bulls | defeated | Hammer Eisbären
matchup | part_of | German Ice Hockey Oberliga 23/24

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: ESC Halle Saale Bulls | defeated | Hammer Eisbären
matchup | part_of | German Ice Hockey Oberliga 23/24

entry.lex: In round 18 of the German Ice Hockey Oberliga 23/24, ESC Halle Saale Bulls defeated Hammer Eisbären 6-3. Despite Hammer Eisbären leading 2-0 after the first period, the Saale Bulls dominated the second period with 5 goals to secure the victory.

originaltripleset.otriple: HC Khimik Voskresensk | defeated | Izhstal Izhevsk

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: HC Khimik Voskresensk | defeated | Izhstal Izhevsk

entry.lex: In a VHL 23/24 ice hockey match, HC Khimik Voskresensk defeated Izhstal Izhevsk 2-1. After a scoreless first period, Khimik took the lead in the second, and both teams scored once in the third to finalize the result.

originaltripleset.otriple: HC Bolzano | three goals | third period
matchup | part_of | round 24 of the 23/24 ICE Hockey League

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: HC Bolzano | three goals | third period
matchup | part_of | round 24 of the 23/24 ICE Hockey League

entry.lex: In round 24 of the 23/24 ICE Hockey League, HC Bolzano defeated Pioneers Vorarlberg 4-1. After a scoreless first period and a 1-1 tie in the second, Bolzano dominated the third period with three goals to secure the victory.
In a KHL 23/24 round 1 match, Severstal Cherepovets defeated Sibir Novosibirsk 2-1.

In the MHL 23/24 season (Round 1), Almaz Cherepovets decisively defeated Kapitan Stupino 7-2. Almaz Cherepovets dominated the first two periods, scoring 5 goals, while Kapitan Stupino managed all their scoring in the third period.

originaltripleset.otriple: Visby/Roma HK defeated Wings HC 3-2 | part_of | first round of the HockeyEttan Ostra 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Visby/Roma HK defeated Wings HC 3-2 | part_of | first round of the HockeyEttan Ostra 23/24 season

entry.lex: In the first round of the HockeyEttan Ostra 23/24 season, Visby/Roma HK defeated Wings HC 3-2.
The Victoriaville Tigres defeated the Quebec Remparts 6-2 in a QMJHL 23/24 season game, with the Tigres dominating throughout, particularly in the second period.

originaltripleset.otriple: Blue Devils Weiden | defeated | Höchstadt Alligators
Blue Devils Weiden defeated the Höchstadt Alligators | part_of | round 21 of the German Ice Hockey Oberliga Sud 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Blue Devils Weiden | defeated | Höchstadt Alligators
Blue Devils Weiden defeated the Höchstadt Alligators | part_of | round 21 of the German Ice Hockey Oberliga Sud 23/24 season

entry.lex: In round 21 of the German Ice Hockey Oberliga Sud 23/24 season, Blue Devils Weiden defeated the Höchstadt Alligators 5-3.

originaltripleset.otriple: Zauralie Kurgan | defeated | CSK VVS Samara

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Zauralie Kurgan | defeated | CSK VVS Samara

entry.lex: In a VHL 23/24 ice hockey match, Zauralie Kurgan defeated CSK VVS Samara 5-4 after a penalty shootout, following a 4-4 draw in regulation time.

originaltripleset.otriple: Rødovre Mighty Bulls | defeated | Herning Blue Fox

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Rødovre Mighty Bulls | defeated | Herning Blue Fox

entry.lex: In the opening round of the 23/24 Metal Ligaen (Superisligaen), Rødovre Mighty Bulls defeated Herning Blue Fox 3-2, securing the win via a penalty shootout after a 2-2 draw in regulation time.

originaltripleset.otriple: BK Mladá Boleslav | defeated | HC Rytíři Kladno
matchup | part_of | Extraliga 23/24 ice hockey season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: BK Mladá Boleslav | defeated | HC Rytíři Kladno
matchup | part_of | Extraliga 23/24 ice hockey season

entry.lex: In round 22 of the Czech Republic's Extraliga 23/24 ice hockey season, BK Mladá Boleslav defeated HC Rytíři Kladno 3-2. After finishing regulation time tied at 2-2, BK Mladá Boleslav secured the victory via a penalty shootout.
In an ECHL 23/24 regular season game, the Indy Fuel defeated the Kalamazoo Wings 4-2.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | round 21 of the German Oberliga Sud 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | round 21 of the German Oberliga Sud 23/24 season

entry.lex: Deggendorfer SC defeated SC Riessersee 4-1 in round 21 of the German Oberliga Sud 23/24 season, maintaining a consistent lead across all three periods.

originaltripleset.otriple: Saginaw Spirit | three goals | first period

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Saginaw Spirit | three goals | first period

entry.lex: In an OHL 23/24 round 1 matchup, the Saginaw Spirit defeated the Niagara IceDogs 6-2, dominating early with three goals in the first period.
In the opening round of the HockeyEttan Norra 23/24 season, Piteå HC secured a dominant 6-1 victory over Strömsbro If, scoring two goals in each of the three periods.

originaltripleset.otriple: Edmonton Oilers | four-goal performance | first period

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Edmonton Oilers | four-goal performance | first period

entry.lex: The Edmonton Oilers dominated the Anaheim Ducks 8-2 in an NHL 23/24 round 1 matchup, securing the win primarily with a strong four-goal performance in the first period.

In a VHL 23/24 ice hockey match, Sokol Krasnoyarsk defeated Buran Voronezh 3-2. After a scoreless first two periods, both teams scored two goals in the third to end regulation in a 2-2 tie; Sokol Krasnoyarsk ultimately secured the victory via a penalty shootout.

originaltripleset.otriple: Henderson Silver Knights | defeated | Tucson Roadrunners

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Henderson Silver Knights | defeated | Tucson Roadrunners

entry.lex: In an AHL 23/24 matchup, the Henderson Silver Knights defeated the Tucson Roadrunners 3-2 after overtime, following a 2-2 tie in regulation.

originaltripleset.otriple: Deac Jegkorong Akademia U20 | defeated | Vasas Budapest Stars U20
matchup | part_of | U20 League Stage 2 Division 2 (Young Stars League 23/24)
Deac Jegkorong Akademia U20 | three goals | third period

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Deac Jegkorong Akademia U20 | defeated | Vasas Budapest Stars U20
matchup | part_of | U20 League Stage 2 Division 2 (Young Stars League 23/24)
Deac Jegkorong Akademia U20 | three goals | third period

entry.lex: In the U20 League Stage 2 Division 2 (Young Stars League 23/24), Deac Jegkorong Akademia U20 defeated Vasas Budapest Stars U20 with a final score of 4-1. After a scoreless first period and a 1-1 tie in the second, Deac Jegkorong Akademia secured the victory with three goals in the third period.

originaltripleset.otriple: Lindlövens IF defeated Forshaga IF | part_of | round 14 of the Swedish HockeyEttan Vastra 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Lindlövens IF defeated Forshaga IF | part_of | round 14 of the Swedish HockeyEttan Vastra 23/24 season

entry.lex: Lindlövens IF defeated Forshaga IF 4-2 in round 14 of the Swedish HockeyEttan Vastra 23/24 season.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | round 1 of the 23/24 Elite League
Cardiff Devils | four-goal performance | third period

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | round 1 of the 23/24 Elite League
Cardiff Devils | four-goal performance | third period

entry.lex: In round 1 of the 23/24 Elite League, the Cardiff Devils secured a dominant 6-0 victory over the Fife Flyers, with a strong 4-goal surge in the third period.

originaltripleset.otriple: Alvesta SK | defeated | Mörrum Gois IK
Alvesta SK | four-goal performance | third period

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Alvesta SK | defeated | Mörrum Gois IK
Alvesta SK | four-goal performance | third period

entry.lex: In round 14 of the HockeyEttan Sodra 23/24 season, Alvesta SK defeated Mörrum Gois IK 6-2, securing the win with a dominant four-goal performance in the third period.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | Slovakian Ice Hockey Extraliga 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | Slovakian Ice Hockey Extraliga 23/24 season

entry.lex: In round 21 of the Slovakian Ice Hockey Extraliga 23/24 season, HC Košice defeated HK Nitra 4-0, scoring two goals in both the first and third periods.

originaltripleset.otriple: matchup | part_of | Erste Liga 23/24 ice hockey season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: matchup | part_of | Erste Liga 23/24 ice hockey season

entry.lex: In the opening round of the Erste Liga 23/24 ice hockey season, FTC-Telekom defeated Gyergyói HK 4-1, with all scoring occurring in the second period.

originaltripleset.otriple: Chelmet Chelyabinsk | four-goal performance | third period

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Chelmet Chelyabinsk | four-goal performance | third period

entry.lex: In a Russian VHL 23/24 round 1 ice hockey match, Chelmet Chelyabinsk defeated Dizel Penza 4-1. Despite Dizel Penza leading 1-0 after the first period, Chelmet Chelyabinsk secured the win with a dominant four-goal surge in the third period.

originaltripleset.otriple: Belye Medvedi | defeated | Chaika Nizhny Novgorod
Belye Medvedi | took lead | first period

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Belye Medvedi | defeated | Chaika Nizhny Novgorod
Belye Medvedi | took lead | first period

entry.lex: In the MHL 23/24 season, Belye Medvedi defeated Chaika Nizhny Novgorod 4-1. Belye Medvedi dominated the match, particularly in the first period where they took a 2-0 lead.

originaltripleset.otriple: Hershey Bears | two goals | first period
Iowa Wild | single response | second period

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Hershey Bears | two goals | first period
Iowa Wild | single response | second period

entry.lex: In an AHL 23/24 season matchup, the Hershey Bears defeated the Iowa Wild 2-1. Hershey secured the win early with two goals in the first period, while Iowa managed a single response in the second.

originaltripleset.otriple: Vimmerby HC | defeated | Halmstad Hammers HC
matchup | part_of | Swedish HockeyEttan Sodra 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Vimmerby HC | defeated | Halmstad Hammers HC
matchup | part_of | Swedish HockeyEttan Sodra 23/24 season

entry.lex: In round 14 of the Swedish HockeyEttan Sodra 23/24 season, Vimmerby HC defeated Halmstad Hammers HC 4-3, securing the win via a penalty shootout after a 3-3 draw in normal time.

originaltripleset.otriple: HC Slovan Bratislava | defeated | HC Nové Zámky
matchup | part_of | Slovakia Ice Hockey Extraliga 23/24 season

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: HC Slovan Bratislava | defeated | HC Nové Zámky
matchup | part_of | Slovakia Ice Hockey Extraliga 23/24 season

entry.lex: In round 21 of the Slovakia Ice Hockey Extraliga 23/24 season, HC Slovan Bratislava defeated HC Nové Zámky 5-2, maintaining a consistent lead across all three periods.
